description: Request body for creating a CMS page.
name: PageCreateRequest

name.description: The internal name of the page.

slug.description: The URL slug for the page.

domain.description: The domain to host the page on.

language.description: The language code for the page content.

templatePath.description: The path to the template to use for the page.

layoutSections.description: The layout sections and widget data for the page content.
